hero.headline: We Are
hero.subheadline: Built from the island. Competing with the world.
hero.description: Puerto Rico's #1 competitive hero shooter org. Overwatch 2 · Marvel Rivals. Built from the island — competing with the world.

games.title: Our Games
games.subtitle: Competing at the highest level across hero shooters.

ow2.name: Overwatch 2
ow2.desc: Precision, teamwork, and strategy. Our OW2 roster competes in Puerto Rico's top leagues and online tournaments.

mr.name: Marvel Rivals
mr.desc: The newest battlefield. IMPerfect is already making waves in Marvel Rivals ranked and competitive scene.

about.title: Built in Puerto Rico
about.body: IMPerfect was born from a simple belief — that Puerto Rico has world-class talent that deserves a world-class stage. We built this team from the ground up, competing, grinding, and representing the island in every match we play.

roster.title: The Roster
roster.subtitle: Meet the players behind the name.

community.title: More Than a Team
community.subtitle: We're building the Puerto Rico gaming community — tournaments, events, content, and a place for every gamer on the island.

sponsorship_teaser.title: Partner With Us
sponsorship_teaser.description: Puerto Rico's #1 hero shooter org. Reach a passionate, hyper-engaged gaming audience across 6 platforms — streaming, social, Discord, and live events.

footer.tagline: Puerto Rico's Premier Hero Shooter Team

team_page.title: Meet the Team
team_page.description: Puerto Rico's premier hero shooter roster — OW2 & Marvel Rivals
team_page.coming_soon_desc: Roster announcement coming soon — follow us on Discord for updates.
team_page.stats_strip: 8 MR Main Squad · 6 Shadows · OW2 Rebuilding · PR #1 · Est. 2017

games_page.title: Our Games
games_page.description: Hero shooters are our home. We compete where the competition is hardest.

results_page.title: Results
results_page.description: Every bracket entered. Every placement earned.
results_page.archive_notice: Full tournament archive coming soon — documenting every run.

community_page.title: More Than a Team
community_page.description: We're building the Puerto Rico gaming community — tournaments, events, content, and a place for every gamer on the island.
community_page.monthly_desc: Every month, every week — something happening for the community.
community_page.growth_desc: Every milestone unlocks something for the community. Help us get there.
community_page.event_inhouse_desc: Org-run 6v6 in Marvel Rivals — open to all Discord members. Announced one week ahead.
community_page.event_clip_desc: Submit your best plays all month. Staff picks the winner. Prize: shoutout + exclusive Discord role.
community_page.event_watch_desc: Watch a major MR or OW2 tournament together in voice. Live reactions and predictions.
community_page.event_giveaway_desc: Sponsor or org giveaway. Entry via Discord reaction or social repost.
community_page.milestone_5000: Full community tournament series + merch drop

about_page.title: Built in Puerto Rico
about_page.description: IMPerfect was born from a simple belief — that Puerto Rico has world-class talent that deserves a world-class stage. We built this org from the ground up, competing, grinding, and representing the island in every match we play.
about_page.roadmap_desc: Three phases. Clear milestones. We're executing this publicly so our community can follow the journey.
about_page.cta_desc: Join our Discord community or reach out about sponsorship opportunities.
about_page.value_island_body: Every match we play, every tournament we enter — we're representing Puerto Rico. That's not a slogan. It's why this org exists.
about_page.value_compete_body: We don't show up to participate. We show up to win. Every roster member, every coach, every team — the standard is high.
about_page.value_build_body: This isn't just a team. It's a community. We grow with our players, our fans, and every gamer on the island.
about_page.value_long_body: We're not a flash in the pan. We're building infrastructure, developing talent, and creating an org that lasts.
about_page.phase_1_m1: Finalize brand identity, logo, and visual system
about_page.phase_1_m2: Build and launch the org website
about_page.phase_1_m3: Set up all social media channels

news_page.title: News
news_page.description: Org updates, tournament recaps, and player news.

sponsorship_page.title: Partner With Us
sponsorship_page.description: Puerto Rico's #1 hero shooter org. Three active teams. A growing community. Reach a passionate gaming audience that actually buys.
sponsorship_page.cta_desc: We keep things simple. Send us an email and we'll get back to you within 48 hours.
sponsorship_page.tier_associate_desc: Get your brand in front of our audience with product placement and community exposure.
sponsorship_page.tier_partner_desc: Full brand integration across stream, jerseys, and regular content — the most popular tier.
sponsorship_page.tier_title_sponsor_desc: Maximum exposure. Your brand at the forefront of everything we do.
sponsorship_page.reason_01_body: Get in at ground level with an org that's building momentum now — before prices rise.
sponsorship_page.reason_02_body: Esports fans are 4× more likely to purchase from sponsors they see in the gaming ecosystem.
sponsorship_page.reason_03_body: Your brand reaches audiences across Twitch, TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, Discord, and live events.
sponsorship_page.reason_04_body: Build authentic ties with the Puerto Rico gaming community — a passionate and underserved market.

community_join.subtitle: Register your team and get access to scrims, events, and the competitive Puerto Rico gaming scene. Takes under 3 minutes.
community_join.team_tag_helper: e.g. IMP — shown next to player names
community_join.region_helper: e.g. Puerto Rico, East US, LATAM
community_join.discord_server_helper: Your team's Discord server if you have one
community_join.players_note: Discord handles help us reach your team for scrim coordination. You do not need to share anything else.
community_join.about_placeholder: How long have you been playing together? What are your goals?
community_join.confirm_text: I confirm our team will join or has already joined the
community_join.confirm_end: before participating in any org events. *
community_join.success_body: Welcome to the IMPerfect Gaming community. Our team will review your registration and reach out via Discord within 48 hours.
community_join.success_contact: Make sure {handle} is reachable — that's how we'll get in touch.
community_join.error_server: Something went wrong — please try again. If the issue persists, reach out on Discord.
community_join.val_team_name_chars: Letters, numbers, spaces, hyphens, apostrophes only
community_join.val_duplicate: Each player must have a unique Discord handle
